# Suites that MUST appear for menu_item_pattern.cpp change
# Source: verified against real XTS workspace (ohos_master), 2026-03-21
#
# menu_item_pattern.cpp is the C++ implementation of MenuItem component.
# Changes to it can affect any test that uses MenuItem, MenuItemModifier,
# Menu, Select, or components that render menu items.
#
# Both entries verified to import MenuItem from @ohos.arkui.component:
#   ace_ets_module_modifier_static: imports MenuItem, MenuItemModifier (menu.ets)
#   ace_ets_module_menu_static: directly tests Menu/MenuItem rendering

ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_modifier_static
ace_ets_module_ui/ace_ets_module_dialog/ace_ets_module_menu_static
